name: Mercuria Investment Co., Ltd.
summary: Mercuria Investment Co., Ltd. is a private equity firm specializing in growth investments, buyout, succession investment, and value investment strategy. It also invests in real estate. The firm seeks to invest in Japan and China as well as the United States and other parts of Asia. It prefers to invests a minority stake. Mercuria Investment Co., Ltd., previously known as AD Capital Co., Ltd., was founded in 2005 and is based in Tokyo, Japan with additional office in Beijing, China.
